name: Ningbo Fuda Company Limited
summary: Ningbo Fuda Company Limited engages in the real estate development business in China. It develops residential properties; and invests in, develops, operates, and manages commercial real estate projects, as well as offers cement building materials. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Yuyao, China. Ningbo Fuda Company Limited is a subsidiary of Ningbo Urban Construction Investment Holding Co.,Ltd.
